delay.description: The delay before the transform will run.

docsPerSecond.description: The number of documents per second to process.

fieldHistoryLength.description: The number of historical values to keep for each field.

frequency.description: The frequency at which the transform will run.

lookbackPeriod.description: The amount of time the transform looks back to calculate the aggregations.

maxPageSearchSize.description: The initial page size to use for the composite aggregation of each checkpoint.

timeout.description: The timeout for initializing the aggregating transform.

timestampField.description: The field to use as the timestamp for the entity type.
